site.title: Tangy TD Guide
site.description: Comprehensive Tangy TD guide with detailed class builds, skill tree recommendations, item crafting recipes, and boss strategies. Master the hero tower defense game!
site.keywords: Tangy TD, tower defense guide, game wiki, class builds, skill tree, item crafting, boss strategy, defender, archer, healer

hero.title: Tangy TD
hero.subtitle: Hero Tower Defense · Class Based · Item Combining
hero.description: Play as witch Tangy, deploy class-based towers, equip and combine over 100 items, customize your builds with a giant skill tree, and defend against hordes of enemies!

classes.title: Classes
classes.subtitle: Three unique classes, each with its own massive skill tree

defender.name: Defender
defender.description: Sturdy towers designed to hold the line and absorb enemy attacks. Essential for protecting your core and other towers.

shieldBash.name: Shield Bash
shieldBash.desc: Bash enemies with shield, dealing damage and stunning

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.desc: Force nearby enemies to attack you

defender.playstyle: Place at the front of the path to attract enemies. Works best with Healer support. Skill tree focuses on survival and crowd control.

archer.name: Archer
archer.description: High damage, long-range towers that pick off enemies from a distance. The primary damage dealers of your defense.

multishot.name: Multishot
multishot.desc: Fire multiple arrows at once, hitting several targets

piercing.name: Piercing Arrow
piercing.desc: Arrow pierces through enemies, damaging all in path

crit.name: Critical Strike
crit.desc: Next attack is guaranteed critical, dealing massive damage

archer.playstyle: Place in safe positions behind Defenders. Skill tree can specialize in single-target burst or AoE clearing.

healer.name: Healer
healer.description: Support towers that keep your defenses alive with healing and buffs. Essential for sustained battles.

groupHeal.name: Group Heal
groupHeal.desc: Restore HP to all nearby allies

shield.name: Shield Blessing
shield.desc: Grant allies a shield that absorbs damage

healer.playstyle: Position to cover multiple allies. Prioritize healing frontline Defenders. Skill tree enhances healing or buff effects.

skillTree.title: Skill Tree
skillTree.subtitle: Over 300 nodes to customize your builds

tips.title: Skill Tree Tips
list: Skill points are earned by defeating enemies
Focus on one branch first, don't spread too thin
You can reset skill points anytime
Match skills with your equipment for maximum effect

defenderTree.name: Defender Skill Tree
defenderTree.description: Enhance defense and survival, unlock powerful crowd control

branches.name: Guardian Power
branches.description: Enhance shield skills and team protection

archerTree.name: Archer Skill Tree
archerTree.description: Boost damage output, unlock various archery techniques

nodes.name: Explosive Arrow
nodes.effect: Arrows cause small explosion on hit

nodes.name: Backflip Shot
nodes.effect: Unlock backflip skill that fires an arrow

items.title: Item System
items.subtitle: Over 100 items to combine and discover powerful recipes

list.name: Vampire Fang
list.desc: 15% of damage dealt converted to HP

list.name: Windwalker Boots
list.desc: Move speed +50%, can pass through enemies

recipes.name: Flame Blade
recipes.desc: Attacks deal fire damage, burning enemies over time

recipes.name: Crit Ring
recipes.desc: Greatly increase crit rate and crit damage

bosses.title: Boss Guide
bosses.subtitle: 6 unique bosses, each with unique mechanics

list.name: Rat King
list.special: Summon Swarm: Periodically summons 3-5 small rats
strategy: Prioritize clearing summoned rats to avoid being surrounded
Use AoE skills to hit both boss and minions
Defender in front to draw aggro, DPS from safe distance

list.name: Shadow Assassin
list.special: Shadow Step: Teleports behind farthest target to attack
strategy: Keep Defender taunt active at all times
Healer must watch HP of targeted units
Use stun skills to interrupt Shadow Step

list.name: Plague Bringer
list.special: Plague Burst: Releases poison cloud, continuous damage in area
strategy: Healer must cleanse poison effect quickly
Spread out to avoid multiple units in poison cloud

list.name: Thunder Behemoth
list.special: Thunder Strike: Deals lightning damage to target and nearby units
strategy: Keep distance between units to prevent lightning chain
Stack magic resistance to reduce damage
Healer prioritize units hit by lightning

list.name: Frost Queen
list.special: Blizzard: Full-screen freeze, greatly reduces attack speed
strategy: Prepare fire equipment and skills to counter freeze
Burst damage before blizzard to reduce HP quickly

list.name: The Destroyer
list.special: Apocalypse: Randomly casts all boss skills
strategy: Requires perfect team coordination and equipment
Familiar with all boss skills and countermeasures

guide.title: Beginner Guide
guide.subtitle: Get started with Tangy TD quickly

steps.title: Basic Controls
content: Use WASD or mouse click to move witch Tangy
Click ground to place towers
Can move towers during combat
Click enemy to prioritize attack
Use number keys 1-4 for skills

steps.title: Class Setup
content: Beginner recommended: 2 Defenders + 2 Archers + 1 Healer
Place Defenders at front of path to attract enemies
Place Archers in safe backline positions
Position Healer to cover multiple allies
Adjust composition based on enemy types

steps.title: Resource Management
content: Defeat enemies to earn gold and skill points
Gold used to buy and upgrade towers
Skill points used to unlock skill tree nodes
Don't over-invest in single tower
Endless mode is good for farming skill points

steps.title: Item Crafting
content: Collect materials to craft items
Prioritize items matching your class
Pay attention to equipment stat synergy
Legendary items require specific materials
Can dismantle equipment to recover materials

steps.title: Skill Tree Planning
content: Focus on one branch first, don't spread thin
Choose skill path based on equipment stats
Can reset skill points to try different builds
Some powerful skills require prerequisites
Check recommended builds on guide sites

list.a: Game includes 8 story levels and endless mode. Story has fixed bosses, endless scales infinitely.
Defeat bosses, open equipment boxes, or craft. Higher difficulty drops better quality.
Yes, game provides skill reset function to reallocate all points and try different builds.
Rewards based on waves survived. Higher waves = better rewards. Also climb global leaderboards.

list.q: Which class is best for beginners?
list.a: Defender is recommended - high forgiveness. Try Archer or Healer after getting familiar.

tips.title: Pro Tips
list: Start with Defenders to attract enemies, then add DPS
Watch enemy types and adjust strategy accordingly
Save skills before boss fights for critical moments
Join Discord to share tips with other players
